mnemonics: My Experiments Yield Superb Results (MYERS: Myers' foundational work in Experimental Design and ANOVA yields robust statistical results for computer scientists.)
keyPoints: Pioneer in the development of response surface methodology for optimizing processes.
Key contributor to the design and analysis of experiments, a core statistical method in computer science for A/B testing and algorithm comparison.
Author of influential textbooks on the subject, establishing standard practices.
commonMistakes: Confusing Raymond H. Myers with other statisticians like Ronald A. Fisher or George E.P. Box.
Overlooking the importance of experimental design principles (like randomization and blocking) that Myers emphasized, and jumping straight to the ANOVA calculation.
Misapplying ANOVA techniques from his work without checking the underlying assumptions (normality, equal variance, independence).
